task_context.actionable_question: Am I at risk of failing?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: State the risk badge (low/medium/high) and at_risk_score out of 5. Use avg_score, pass_threshold, engagement_score, and punctuality_rate when available. If risk is high, name the top 2 likely triggered factors from returned metrics only.

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: You are currently identified as being at high risk of failing, with an at-risk score of 3 out of 5. This is primarily due to low engagement and punctuality issues.

Insights: Low Engagement Score: Your engagement score is quite low at 0.20, which indicates that you may not be participating fully in your learning activities. This can significantly impact your understanding and retention of the material. | Punctuality Rate: Your punctuality rate is at 0, meaning you may not be attending classes or submitting assignments on time. This can lead to missed opportunities for learning and support.

Educational implications: Improving engagement and punctuality can lead to better academic outcomes.

Recommendations: high - Increase participation in class activities and discussions. - Active engagement can help you understand the material better and feel more connected to your learning. | high - Establish a routine to ensure timely attendance and assignment submissions. - Being punctual can help you stay on track and make the most of your educational opportunities.
